task_completion.description: Verify that a bookmark folder named 'AI Legislation 118th' was created in Firefox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Firefox bookmarks toolbar, menu, or sidebar showing a folder explicitly named 'AI Legislation 118th'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the overview pages for H.R. 926, S. 2293, and H.R. 5077 are saved in the bookmark folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of the 'AI Legislation 118th' bookmark folder. It should contain three links corresponding to the Congress.gov overview pages for H.R. 926, S. 2293, and H.R. 5077.

task_completion.description: Verify that the PDF full text of H.R. 5077 was downloaded to ~/Documents/Bills/hr5077_text.pdf.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window or terminal output showing the file 'hr5077_text.pdf' located inside the 'Bills' directory within the 'Documents' folder.

task_completion.description: Verify that the status report was created at ~/Documents/legislative_report.json.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager, text editor, or terminal showing a file named 'legislative_report.json' located in the 'Documents' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON report contains the session, topic, and correct bill numbers and short titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the contents of 'legislative_report.json'. It must include keys for session (118th Congress) and topic, plus a list of bills containing H.R. 926, S. 2293, and H.R. 5077 with their correct short titles (e.g., CREATE AI Act, AI LEAD Act, Supreme Court Ethics...).

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON report contains the correct primary sponsors, introduced dates, and latest action dates formatted as YYYY-MM-DD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the contents of 'legislative_report.json'. Check that the sponsors match the privileged info (Hank Johnson, Brian Schatz, Anna Eshoo), introduced dates are correct and in YYYY-MM-DD format (2023-02-09, 2023-07-13, 2023-07-28), and latest action dates are present in YYYY-MM-DD format.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the web browser to navigate Congress.gov.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing Firefox open to Congress.gov with search results or bill overview pages, rather than just a script or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the PDF was actually downloaded from the source and not just created as an empty/dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for Firefox download history/popups showing the PDF download, or the PDF being opened in a viewer showing actual legislative text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just hardcode the JSON file without researching.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there is evidence of the agent extracting information from the Congress.gov pages (e.g., highlighting text, viewing the pages) before the JSON file is populated.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Session: 118th Congress (2023-2024). H.R. 926: Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal, and Transparency Act of 2023, Sponsor: Hank Johnson, Intro Date: 2023-02-09. S. 2293: AI Leadership To Enable Accountable Deployment Act (or AI LEAD Act), Sponsor: Brian Schatz, Intro Date: 2023-07-13. H.R. 5077: Creating Resources for Every American To Experiment with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2023 (or CREATE AI Act), Sponsor: Anna Eshoo, Intro Date: 2023-07-28.
